children.id: Mail_Service
Mail Messages
Positive_Scenario
Messages list does not contain html_body field
Negative_Scenario
Cross-mailbox message access returns 404 MESSAGE_NOT_FOUND
Get message with non-existent mailbox token returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Get messages for non-existent mailbox returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Get message with non-existent message ID returns 404 MESSAGE_NOT_FOUND
End_to_End_Flow
After sending message count is 1
Get message by ID returns 200 with full body and html_body
Get messages for new mailbox returns 200 with count 0
Mailbox Delete
End_to_End_Flow
Delete mailbox with messages — message retrieval also returns 404
Positive_Scenario
Delete mailbox returns 204 and subsequent GET returns 404
Delete mailbox twice — second returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Negative_Scenario
Delete non-existent mailbox returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Delete mailbox — GET messages also returns 404
Mailbox Get
Positive_Scenario
Get mailbox by token returns 200 with all expected fields
Negative_Scenario
Get mailbox with non-existent token returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Get mailbox with malformed token returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Mailbox Create
Positive_Scenario
Create mailbox with empty body returns 201 with all required fields
Create mailbox with valid domain returns 201
Create mailbox with custom local_part returns 201 with matching email
Negative_Scenario
Create mailbox with local_part shorter than 3 chars returns 400 INVALID_LOCAL_PART
Create mailbox with local_part longer than 30 chars returns 400 INVALID_LOCAL_PART
Create mailbox with invalid domain returns 400 INVALID_DOMAIN
Create mailbox with allowed special chars underscore and hyphen returns 201
Create duplicate mailbox local_part and domain returns 409 ADDRESS_TAKEN
Create mailbox with local_part at minimum boundary 3 chars returns 201
Create mailbox with local_part at maximum boundary 30 chars returns 201
Create mailbox with @ in local_part returns 400 INVALID_LOCAL_PART
Create mailbox with uppercase in local_part returns 400 INVALID_LOCAL_PART
Mail Send
Negative_Scenario
Send message missing required field from returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
End_to_End_Flow
Sent message appears in GET messages list
Positive_Scenario
Send message returns 201 with full message object
Sent message is retrievable via GET messages ID
Send message without html_body returns 201
Send message missing required field body returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Send message to non-existent mailbox returns 404 MAILBOX_NOT_FOUND
Send message missing required field subject returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
User_Lifecycle
User Exists
Positive_Scenario
HEAD existing user returns 200 with X-User-Exists true
Negative_Scenario
GET alias for exists with non-existent user returns 404
Check exists with malformed ID returns 404 with X-User-Exists false
HEAD non-existent user returns 404 with X-User-Exists false
End_to_End_Flow
After delete user exists returns false
GET alias for exists with existing user returns 200 with X-User-Exists true
Update User
Negative_Scenario
PUT update with invalid email returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Positive_Scenario
Full update user with valid token returns 200
PUT update with no Authorization header returns 401 MISSING_TOKEN
End_to_End_Flow
PUT update after logout returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
PUT update non-existent user with another user token returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
PUT update persists changed email in subsequent GET
PUT update with another user token returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
Create User
Positive_Scenario
Create user with empty interests array returns 201
Negative_Scenario
Create user with password shorter than 8 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with valid employment status returns 201
Create user with valid gender enum returns 201
Create user metadata fields are correct on creation
access_token format matches usr_{timestamp}_{hex} pattern
Create user with multiple interests returns 201
Create user with username shorter than 3 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with valid theme returns 201
Create user with username longer than 30 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with bio longer than 500 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with invalid gender enum returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Response body never contains password field
Create user with invalid theme enum returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with first_name shorter than 2 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with username at maximum length 30 chars returns 201
Create user with minimal required fields returns 201 with token
Create user with invalid employment status enum returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with duplicate username returns 409 DUPLICATE_USER
Create user with all optional fields returns 201
Create user with duplicate email returns 409 DUPLICATE_USER
VALIDATION_ERROR response contains request_id and error details
Create user missing profile.first_name returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Create user with username at minimum length 3 chars returns 201
Create user with invalid email returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Delete User
Negative_Scenario
Delete with no Authorization header returns 401 MISSING_TOKEN
Positive_Scenario
Delete returns 204 with empty body
End_to_End_Flow
Delete same user twice — second delete returns 404
Delete non-existent user with another user token returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
Delete user with valid token returns 204 and subsequent GET returns 404
Delete with another user token returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
Patch User
Positive_Scenario
Patch only username returns 200
Patch only email — other fields remain unchanged
Partial update firstName returns 200
Patch with empty body returns 200 with no changes
Negative_Scenario
Patch with another user token returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
End_to_End_Flow
Patch after logout returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
Patch with no auth header returns 401 MISSING_TOKEN
Get User
Negative_Scenario
Get user with malformed ID returns 404 USER_NOT_FOUND
Positive_Scenario
Get user by ID returns 200 with expected fields
Get user by non-existent ID returns 404 USER_NOT_FOUND
Options
Positive_Scenario
OPTIONS returns 204
OPTIONS does not require Authorization header
List Users
Positive_Scenario
Get users list with per_page 100 returns 200
Users list has Cache-Control no-store header
Get users list with per_page 10 returns at most 10 results
Users list response does not contain access_token or password
Get users list returns 200 with pagination fields
Authentication
Login
End_to_End_Flow
Login after logout succeeds and issues new token
Positive_Scenario
Login with valid credentials returns 200 and token
Negative_Scenario
Login with empty body returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Login with invalid email format returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Login error response contains request_id in body
Login with wrong password returns 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS
Login invalidates previous token — old token returns 401 on PATCH
Login response contains all required fields
Login with non-existent email returns 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS
Login with password shorter than 8 chars returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Login X-Request-ID is echoed in response header
Logout
End_to_End_Flow
Double logout — second attempt returns 401 INVALID_TOKEN
Negative_Scenario
Logout with no auth header returns 401 MISSING_TOKEN
Positive_Scenario
Logout returns 200 with success true message
Logout revoked token — PUT also returns 401
User can re-login after logout and receives new valid token
Logout revoked token — PATCH returns 401
Logout revoked token — DELETE also returns 401
System
Health Check
Positive_Scenario
Health endpoint returns 200 with status ok and timestamp
Health response includes X-Request-ID header auto-generated
Health response echoes provided X-Request-ID header
